params.name: Maya Slate
params.source: Dragon Chest (0.1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.06%)
params.description:
On Mar 11, AD 900, this prophecy stone was buried in the mountains of Honduras after a sacrifice.

On this day, Maya priests engraved their prophecy that the world will end in a thousand years. On this stone slab is written: The Fifth Era has ended. A new century begins. The crocodile god will flood the earth, wiping humans from the planet. However, this prophecy did not come true. Instead, these New Age pseudo-scientists were exposed as being frauds.
